title: athyrium membranaceum
intro: Athyrium membranaceum, also known as the membrane-leaved lady fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the Athyrium genus. It is a deciduous, perennial plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, due to its saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds. Athyrium membranaceum can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
